zh.lifeSummary: 當GilleBride MacGille Adomnan於1080年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾莫文時，他的父親Giolla Adomnan mac Solaim16歲，母親Thora Inen MacFergus20歲。他於1100年與Berthoc Imergisdatter在蘇格蘭阿吉爾結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1164年在蘇格蘭雷福福爾雷福盧享年84歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当GilleBride MacGille Adomnan于1080年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾莫文时，他的父亲Giolla Adomnan mac Solaim16岁，母亲Thora Inen MacFergus20岁。他于1100年与Berthoc Imergisdatter在苏格兰阿吉爾结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于1164年在苏格兰雷福福爾雷福盧享年84岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: MacGille
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McGill
meanings: Scottish and Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Ghoill ‘son of the stranger (or lowlander)’ (see Gall 1).

Irish and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac (an) G(h)iolla (Irish) or Mac (an) G(h)ille (Scottish) ‘son of the lad’ (i.e. ‘servant’), or a short form of a personal name formed by attaching this element to the name of a saint, in the sense ‘devotee’.

nameMeanings.name: GilleBride
meanings: Gaelic: A Gaelic form of Gilbert.

en.lifeSummary: When GilleBride MacGille Adomnan was born in 1080, in Morven, Argyll, Scotland, his father, Giolla Adomnan mac Solaim, was 16 and his mother, Thora Inen MacFergus, was 20. He married Berthoc Imergisdatter in 1100, in Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died in 1164, in Renfrew, Renfrewshire, Scotland, at the age of 84, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque GilleBride MacGille Adomnan est né en 1080, à Morven, Argyll, Écosse, son père, Giolla Adomnan mac Solaim, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Thora Inen MacFergus, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Berthoc Imergisdatter en 1100, à Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1164, à Renfrew, Renfrewshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als GilleBride MacGille Adomnan 1080 in Morven, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Giolla Adomnan mac Solaim 16 und seine Mutter Thora Inen MacFergus 20. Er hat 1100 in Argyll, Scotland Berthoc Imergisdatter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb 1164 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Renfrew, Renfrewshire, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando GilleBride MacGille Adomnan è nato il nel 1080 nel Morven, Argyll, Scotland, il suo padre, Giolla Adomnan mac Solaim, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Thora Inen MacFergus, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Berthoc Imergisdatter nel 1100, nel Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì nel 1164, nel Renfrew, Renfrewshire, Scotland, all'età di 84 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: GilleBride MacGille Adomnanが1080年にスコットランドアルグイルモーベンで生まれた時，父Giolla Adomnan mac Solaimは16歳，母Thora Inen MacFergusは20歳であった。1100年にスコットランドアルグイルでBerthoc Imergisdatterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1164年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアレンフリューで84歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: GilleBride MacGille Adomnan(이)가 1080년 스컷랜드 아그이 모르븐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Giolla Adomnan mac Solaim(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Thora Inen MacFergus(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1100년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 Berthoc Imergisdatter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1164년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 렌프레에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

mn.North Ballachulish, Inverness-shire, Sco: North Ballachulish, Siorrachd Inbhir Nis, Шотланд

pt.lifeSummary: Quando GilleBride MacGille Adomnan nasceu em 1080, em Morven, Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, Giolla Adomnan mac Solaim, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Thora Inen MacFergus, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Berthoc Imergisdatter em 1100, em Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1164, em Renfrew, Renfrewshire, Scotland, com 84 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда GilleBride MacGille Adomnan родился в 1080 г. в местности морвен, аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Giolla Adomnan mac Solaim было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Thora Inen MacFergus, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Berthoc Imergisdatter в 1100 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер в 1164 г. в местности ренфрю, ренфрюшир, Шотландия в возрасте 84 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

sm.from 1080 to 1164: mai le 1080 e o'o I le 1164

es.lifeSummary: Cuando GilleBride MacGille Adomnan nació en 1080, en Morven, Argyll, Scotland, su papá, Giolla Adomnan mac Solaim, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Thora Inen MacFergus, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Berthoc Imergisdatter en 1100, en Argyll, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió en 1164, en Renfrew, Renfrewshire, Scotland, a la edad de 84 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
